options.content: **Outbox saga** — Üstten saga seçmezsen **son oluşan saga** kullanılır. Graf çoğunlukla oklarla (`saga_step` sırası); tek adımda tek düğüm. İsim ve durum **Adım detayı** tablosunda. Bu veritabanında hiç `saga_id` dolu satır yoksa her şey boş kalır (çoğu tek-adım outbox satırında `saga_id` null olabilir).

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT saga_id)::bigint AS value FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT saga_id::text, count(*) AS steps, max(saga_step) AS max_step, bool_or(is_compensation) AS has_comp, min(created_at) AS started FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY saga_id ORDER BY started DESC LIMIT 15

WITH sel AS ( SELECT COALESCE( CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM('${saga_id}'), '') IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(TRIM('${saga_id}'), '')::uuid ELSE NULL END, (SELECT saga_id FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY saga_id ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC LIMIT 1) ) AS sid ), rows AS ( SELECT o.id::text AS nid, o.saga_id, o.is_compensation, o.saga_step FROM outbox o CROSS JOIN sel s WHERE s.sid IS NOT NULL AND o.saga_id = s.sid ), ordered AS ( SELECT nid, saga_id, is_compensation, saga_step, LAG(nid) OVER (PARTITION BY saga_id, is_compensation ORDER BY saga_step ASC) AS src FROM rows ), agg AS ( SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt FROM rows ), chain AS ( SELECT CONCAT(src, '→', nid) AS id, src AS source, nid AS target FROM ordered WHERE src IS NOT NULL ) SELECT id, source, target FROM chain UNION ALL SELECT r.nid || '→loop', r.nid, r.nid FROM (SELECT DISTINCT nid FROM rows) r CROSS JOIN agg a CROSS JOIN sel s WHERE a.cnt = 1 AND s.sid IS NOT NULL

WITH sel AS ( SELECT COALESCE( CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM('${saga_id}'), '') IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(TRIM('${saga_id}'), '')::uuid ELSE NULL END, (SELECT saga_id FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY saga_id ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC LIMIT 1) ) AS sid ) SELECT saga_step, is_compensation, external_name, status, created_at, processed_at, root_request_id, CASE WHEN processed_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_at - created_at))::numeric, 3)::text, 's') ELSE '-' END AS processing_duration FROM outbox o CROSS JOIN sel s WHERE s.sid IS NOT NULL AND o.saga_id = s.sid ORDER BY is_compensation ASC, saga_step ASC

list.label: Saga
list.name: saga_id
list.query: SELECT saga_id::text FROM outbox WHERE saga_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY saga_id ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC LIMIT 500
